This website uses cookies
This website uses analytical and profiling cookies, also of “third parts”, which permit to send advertising messages in line with the user's preferences. You can choose if you accept all the cookies "Accept all" or only the technical ones. On “settings” you will find our extended policy.

About

This extended policy, offers all the elements required by the European Directive 2002/58/CE, the so called “e-Privacy” and by the measure of the 8 May 2014 of the Italian Personal Data Protection Authority, published into the Official Journal n. 126 of the 3 of June 2014.  The policy aims to show the visitor in an exhaustive way all the so.called “cookies” uses.

Definition and characteristics of cookies:
Cookies and similar technologies are information that websites send or read on your devices at the first sight, in order to be retransmitted to the same websites the next time you visit them. Thanks to these technologies, websites remember actions and preferences (like, for example,  login data, the chosen language, the caracter dimension, other display settings, etc.) in order that they must not be repeated. These technologies are used in order to perform informatic identification, control session and information storage of information about user’s activities which have access to a service and that can include an identification code which permits to keep track of the web browsing for statistical reasons or advertising ones. There are different types of cookies that, according to their functions and characteristics, can persist on your device for different periods of time: the so-called session cookies, which are automatically deleted when you close the browser; and the so-called persistent cookies, which stay on your device for a set time. According to the applicable legislation, the previous consent for the cookie’s use is not always requested. In particular, this consent is not required for “technical” cookies, for example those ones used in order to carry an electronic  communication network, or strictly necessary in order to provide a service which has been specifically requested. In other words, cookies are crucial for a website operability. The previous consent is required for “analytical” cookies not anonymized and for the “profiling” ones, for example those that offer statistical analysis on the use of a website or create users profiles in order to send advisory message according with their preferences that they have shown during the browsing. 

How to visualize and change cookies by the browser:
You can authorise, block or delete (wholly or partly) cookies by specific functions of the browser or by additional components of other third parts. Anyway, the technical cookies deactivation from the website can involve that some services or functionality of the website are no longer available or can no longer correctly work. For further information on how to set preferences of the cookie’s use from the browser, the user can consult the following instructions Internet Explorer, Firefox, Safari, Chrome.

Type of cookies used by the Website and the possibility to deselection:
During the browsing of the website, different types of cookies will be loaded in your system. Some cookies will be loaded by services of third parts that appear on our page. In any moment is possible to change or revoke your own consent from the “cookie’s declaration” on our website.  Find out more about who we are, how to contact us and how we process your personal data, by consulting our Privacy Policy.
